chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يُعْرَفُ إِلَّا بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – He<sup>azwj</sup> cannot be recognised except by Him<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/300)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/300)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي نَاظَرْتُ قَوْماً فَقُلْتُ لَهُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ جَلَّ جَلَالُهُ أَجَلُّ وَ أَعَزُّ وَ أَكْرَمُ مِنْ أَنْ يُعْرَفَ بِخَلْقِهِ بَلِ الْعِبَادُ يُعْرَفُونَ بِاللَّهِ فَقَالَ رَحِمَكَ اللَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazan, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Mansour Bin Hazim who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I debated a group, so I said to them that Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Majestic is His<sup>azwj</sup> Majesty is more Majestic and more Mighty, and more Benevolent than that He<sup>azwj</sup> should be recognised through His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures. But it is the creatures who are being recognised through Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> have Mercy on you’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Isma‘il has narrated the following from al-Fadl ibn shadhan from Safwan ibn Yahya from Mansur ibn Hazim who has said that I spoke to Imam abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) saying, “I debated certain people and said to them, ‘Allah, Glory be to Him, is far Glorious, Majestic and Honorable than being defined by means of His creatures. In fact, the existence of the creatures is proved through the existence of Allah.’” The Imam (a.s.) said, “May Allah bestow up on you blessings.”
